scripts.proto:gen: bun run scripts/embed-proto.ts && pbjs -t static-module -w es6 -o generated/cambrian.js proto/cambrian.proto && pbts -o generated/cambrian.d.ts generated/cambrian.js
scripts.build: bun build src/index.tsx --outdir dist --target node --external react-devtools-core
scripts.build:bin: bun build src/index.tsx --compile --target node --external react-devtools-core --outfile dist/cambrian
